top_signals.title: Takaichi Cabinet retains high approval ratings despite challenges
top_signals.summary: Latest polls from NHK and JNN show support declining just 1 and 5.9 percentage points, respectively, compared to polls from March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
